Uses of Class
neqsim.process.safety.dispersion.ProbitModel

Packages that use ProbitModel
Package
Description
neqsim.process.safety.dispersion
Gas dispersion and exposure screening models for process-safety consequence analysis.
neqsim.process.safety.qra
 

  • Uses of ProbitModel in neqsim.process.safety.dispersion

    Methods in neqsim.process.safety.dispersion that return ProbitModel
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static ProbitModel
    ProbitModel.ammoniaFatality()
    Toxic-fatality probit for ammonia (TNO Green Book).
    static ProbitModel
    ProbitModel.blastLungFatality()
    Lung-haemorrhage fatality probit for blast overpressure (Eisenberg): Y = -77.1 + 6.91·ln(ΔP), ΔP in Pa.
    static ProbitModel
    ProbitModel.chlorineFatality()
    Toxic-fatality probit for chlorine (Eisenberg): Y = -17.10 + 1.69·ln(C^2.75·t), C in ppm, t in min.
    static ProbitModel
    ProbitModel.h2sFatality()
    Toxic-fatality probit for H₂S (TNO Green Book): Y = -31.42 + 3.008·ln(C^1.43·t), C in ppm, t in min.
    static ProbitModel
    ProbitModel.thermalFatality()
    Thermal radiation fatality probit for unprotected skin (Eisenberg): Y = -14.9 + 2.56·ln(t·I^(4/3)/10⁴), t in s, I in W/m².

  • Uses of ProbitModel in neqsim.process.safety.qra

    Methods in neqsim.process.safety.qra with parameters of type ProbitModel
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ConsequenceAnalysisEngine
    ConsequenceAnalysisEngine.addJetFire(double probability, JetFireModel model, ProbitModel probit, double exposureSeconds)
    Convenience: add a jet-fire outcome.
    ConsequenceAnalysisEngine
    ConsequenceAnalysisEngine.addPoolFire(double probability, PoolFireModel model, ProbitModel probit, double exposureSeconds)
    Convenience: add a pool-fire outcome.
    ConsequenceAnalysisEngine
    ConsequenceAnalysisEngine.addToxicDispersion(double probability, GaussianPlume plume, ProbitModel probit, double molarMassKgPerMol, double tempK, double pressureBara, double exposureMinutes)
    Convenience: add a toxic dispersion outcome (Gaussian plume + probit).
    ConsequenceAnalysisEngine
    ConsequenceAnalysisEngine.addVCE(double probability, VCEModel model, ProbitModel probit)
    Convenience: add a VCE outcome with blast-lung probit.
